detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SanzunoKawa._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SanzunoKawa.sol#649-773):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SanzunoKawa.sol#713)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SanzunoKawa.sol#787-799)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SanzunoKawa.sol#719)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SanzunoKawa.sol#807)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SanzunoKawa.sol#771)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SanzunoKawa.sol#933)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SanzunoKawa.sol#913)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SanzunoKawa.sol#915)
	SanzunoKawa._rOwned (SanzunoKawa.sol#325) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SanzunoKawa._takeTeam(uint256) (SanzunoKawa.sol#927-935)
	- SanzunoKawa._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SanzunoKawa.sol#887-923)
	- SanzunoKawa.balanceOf(address) (SanzunoKawa.sol#475-479)
	- SanzunoKawa.constructor() (SanzunoKawa.sol#409-439)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SanzunoKawa.sol#771)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SanzunoKawa.sol#941)
	SanzunoKawa._rTotal (SanzunoKawa.sol#337) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SanzunoKawa._getCurrentSupply() (SanzunoKawa.sol#1083-1093)
	- SanzunoKawa._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SanzunoKawa.sol#939-945)
	- SanzunoKawa.constructor() (SanzunoKawa.sol#409-439)
	- SanzunoKawa.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SanzunoKawa.sol#571-593)
